name: Chocolate Covered White Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 packages (8 ounces each) cream cheese, softened
12 ounces semisweet chocolate, broken into small pieces (or semisweet chocolate bits)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix cookie crumbs and melted butter; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Beat cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in melted white chocolate and pour over crust.
4. Bake 40 minutes. Turn off oven; allow cake to cool inside the oven as it continues cooling down. Loosen cake from rim of pan and remove completely.
5. Cool for at least 4 hours before removing rim.
6. Heat heavy cream, butter, and sugar in a heavy saucepan over medium-high heat. Stir until sugar crystals dissolve, then bring to a boil.
7. Pour boiling cream mixture over chocolate pieces; let stand for a few minutes. Stir until smooth and cool.
8. Cover sides and top of cheesecake with ganache; chill at least 2 hours before serving.
